# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test External Contributions

on:
  pull_request_target:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      with:
        ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
        repository: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        pytest

    - name: Post test results as comment
      uses: marocchino/sticky-pull-request-comment@v2
      with:
        header: "Test Results"
        message: ${{ steps.run-tests.outputs.results }}
        number: ${{ github.event.number }}
